title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SRM University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SRM University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at SRM University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About SRM University:
SRM University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRM University!
